feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Build Library and SAP Build Apps Integration Issue
entry.content:
Hi guys,
I have one demo process in my SAP Build Process Automation Application and I have deployed and published it.


Now, in my SAP Build Apps, I have created an application and in Integration tab, I selected SAP Build Library, I can see my process there, but when I click on it shows Page not found.


I have also configured sap_process_automation_service_user_access destination in my BTP for the instance of Build Process automation and test shows successful & 401. Also, added that destination in control tower's destination in build lobby. Please help.

In the attached image we can see the published process available in cloud library.

SAP Build Library

Page Not Found Error for process

Thanks & Regards,
Marsh

entry.title: Problem with Action Project Design | Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I have discovered a problem with the Action Project Design in the SAP Build Lobby.

I have been trying to structure a request body using the "Build from Scratch" option. However, when I save the fields, items in nested objects will change order. I deleted the fields and added them again and even made an entirely new Action Project with no success in resolving the order of the fields. I assume there is a logic problem with this tool.

In my case I need to have control over the field order or the request will cause a processing failure.

Any help in getting a this resolved would be greatly appreciated.

#SAPBuild

@SAPSupport @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: SAP Build App event handler issue
entry.content:
Hey guys

I have configured sap_process_automation_service_user_access destination in my BTP for the instance of Build Process automation and test shows successful & 401. Also, added that destination in control tower's destination in build lobby

I have also created a Web & Mobile application in Sap Build App 

And I have integrated a process (Sap Build Automation) into Sap Build App. 

When I preview my application, I'm encountering an error in SAP Build App: Unknown node id: page:1:component:<ID>:onFocus/onBlur/onKeyPress/onChange when interacting with input fields. The error mentions Abort fetching component for route: "/[appId]/[appName]/[...params]". I don't have any logic configured for these events, can anyone help me identify the cause of this issue?

Thank in advance, 

Giang

entry.title: Desktop Agent Not Receiving Project in Deployed Mode
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I’m following the "Process and approve your invoices with SAP Build Process Automation" mission from SAP Discovery Center.

Link: https://discovery-center.cloud.sap/protected/index.html#/mymissiondetail/145344/cardName/Invoice%20automatically%20processed%20and%20posted%20to%20SAP%20S%2F4HANA%20Cloud/?tab=projectboard

I am currently facing an issue with the SAP Build Process Automation Desktop Agent. The agent is running fine in editable/test mode and the automation works as expected.

However, once I deploy the project, and trigger the process via form link, the Desktop Agent does not receive the project.

The following actions have already been checked/completed:

* Agent is properly configured and in attended mode.

* Required attributes have been added to the agent and to the project.

* Connection between Desktop Agent & Tenant : Active

* The agent is assigned to the correct environment.

* Tried restarting the agent and redeploying the project.

Despite all these steps, the Desktop Agent still displays the message: "It looks like no project has been received yet. When there are, you'll see them here."

In SAP Community tab, I've seen a post related to my issue and they said "You need to create an Automation Launcher in able for your automation to be called on the machine's desktop agent.

Your project needs to be added in "Automation Launchers" to be distributed to Attended Agents:"

In my project, already automation launcher is there. But I can't able to add my project under "Automation Launchers" tab.

Can someone please help identify what might be missing or misconfigured? Any guidance or troubleshooting steps would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Build Apps Issue
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are working on a scenario where in we are using build apps. However, we are facing couple of challenges.

1. During the loading of home page, We want a list item to be shown in the initial screen. We have created a data variable which gives a array but it does not show up in the list item page. However, using toggle, we can see the value being returned. Attached screen shot:

Build App classical entity rest API destination integration which is used for data variables.

Same is called inside flow logic ( getdefectdata 😞

However, when using list items repeated, it does not show up line item data. However, while using toast functionality, it shows the data up. 

2. We want users to capture image from camera and use the same image for uploading to Hana Cloud for which we were using filepath location and filetobase64 converter. However, it seems once the converter gets called, system gets stuck up. We dont want users to take picture separately and then come to apps for better user experience. How can this be fixed ? I have created a parallal branch just to show up. Ideally its only 1 flow that gets executed and in that flow it gets stuck up completely and app needs to be stopped. I am using the Build App testing platform in android to test this. We have created a BLOB storage in Hanacloud and is trying to update that data

Can you please suggest on this. Is this something that we are missing or it looks like a product issue and we need to reach out to SAP ?

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: How to bring the Approve/Reject step from SAP My Inbox into my custom SAP Build App
entry.content:
Hey guys, 

I'm building an application allows admin can approve/reject those order when user create their order in sap build process automation

So the question i want to know the answer is : How to bring the Approve/Reject step from SAP My Inbox into my custom SAP Build Apps application

Thank in advance, 

Giang

entry.title: How to use events in SAP business accelerator hub in SAP Build?
entry.content:
Hi guys,

We are trying to automate a process whenever an employee is hired through success factors. The general overview is that:

1. New employee is onboarded in SF and the EmployeeHire event in SF will be triggered

2. A process in SAP Build Process Automation is called when the event above is triggered, and should automatically start the process flow

Upon browsing, we saw in SAP Business Accelerator Hub these SF events and tried to use it as the event trigger in SBPA, however, we do not know how the 2 will connect. 

The steps we've currently taken are

1. Under SAP Build > Connectors > Events > Create > choose SAP Business Accelerator Hub as event source > Filter products to only show SAP SuccessFactors > choose an event package (for trying out purposes, we've chosen Employee Central Position Notification Events)

2. Create new SAP Build Process Automation > Create Process > choose Wait for an event as trigger > choose Employee Central Position Data processed

After above steps, we are now in the dark on what are the next steps. One of our main questions is that how will SBPA know which SF system to listen to? Where should this be set/configured? Once these connections are done, are there other steps that we need to do? Any help on how we can achieve the general overview is very much appreciated.

Thanks,

erza

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation - Sequence of automated forms
entry.content:
Hey everybody,

we have been asked by a customer to update their processes within excel to #BuildProcessAutomation

We want to automate the workflow of customer data changing and manipulation. There are 6 forms that need to be integrated within build apps with different intentions, e.g. one form to change customer data, one form to delete a customer, one form to create a new customer, etc.

Here are our thoughts for the planned process:

1. First form to choose from a list of the 6 forms, with an explanation, for what every following form is needed.

2. The User decides for one form from the list. Now the chosen form needs to open flawless within the same browser window and without the systems information "Form succesfully sent". 

We thought about these two options: 

1. A dropdown to choose the form. Click on the "submit" button, and somehow the chosen form opens and can be filled with the needed data.

or

2. A list within the form with links to each of the following needed forms, that the user can click on, and the next form opens.

Which ideas do you have? Or does anyone have recommondations on how to build this process?

Thank you very much everybody.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation free plan screen
entry.content:
Hi Learners,

Why the Free tier SAP Build process Automation is showing like this? I was doing Develop and automate with SAP Build course and doing this section Automating Processes with SAP Build Automation.

Regards

Kunal Bisht

entry.title: Unable to format SAP build output coming from LLM
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on an copilot created using SAP Build apps which talks with SAP AI core instance to answer queries asked .

The app works perfectly fine but the outcome lacks formats and colors which we usually see when we ask similiar questions to other copilots or chatbots.

Please find attached my apps output and other copilots output .Can you help me how I can retain the format of the outcome of LLM and display it on my application?

SAP Build 

SAP AI Core

entry.title: Actions in SAP Build Process Automation -- Need to call $Batch in Action Task
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to implement a batch call in Build Process Automation using an Action Task. I have configured the destination in the BTP Cockpit and also created an Action Project in SAP Build.

When testing the Action Project independently, I am able to retrieve the expected data. However, when using it within a workflow, I am encountering the following error:

Action Identifier:
post_batch
Destination:
GET_DATA
Error Message:
Action '7a1f2496-6c0d-48ce-a724-9ca2651d8fab' failed with the following error:
'Action metadata not found in database for tenant f5a191b7-809f-4113-87fe-6b21da19d542, project us10.93112af8trial.getdatacall, version 1.0.3, action group b315b59d-bafd-3cbf-a4a2-79a0743dfac0, and action post_batch'.

Log ID:
fdc268b4-2c5c-439a-814b-802b67e-us10

I have also attached a screenshot of the configuration.
Please let me know how I can resolve this issue.

Destination Config Screenshot:

Action Config Screenshot:

 

BPA workflow Screenshot:

Thanks,

Parth

entry.title: DME file format HDFC bank
entry.content:
Hi SAP Guru,

I am configuring DME for XXX bank, India.

Bank has asked for certain fields

like

1.  record identifier - "~"

2.payment run date

3. Identification

4. payment document number

5. amount

6. Payment method

and below that for payment advice it needed

1. advice header - "~H"

2. Payment document number

3. Detail identifier - "~D"

4.Invoice number

5. Invoice amount

With the help of DME i have configured every single data required by the bank

But they require data of payment advice once the data of all the payment document is completed

to explain a bit more I will take e.g. of a pay run

which creates two payment document 200000393 & 200000394

so the output they require is like this

1. reference" ~ "

2.Run ID - 05.04.2013

3. Identification - test

4. Payment document - 200000393 ( it is paid after clearing two invoices 0100000014 )

5. Amount -970

6. payment method - N

1. reference" ~ "

2.Run ID - 05.04.2013

3. Identification - test

4. Payment document - 200000394 ( it is paid after clearing invoices 0100000016 )

5. Amount -975

6. payment method - N

1. ~H

2.Payment document - 200000393

3.~D

4. Invoice number-0100000014

5. Invoice amt - 970

1. ~H

2.Payment document - 200000394

3.~D

4. Invoice number-0100000016

5. Invoice amt - 975

Means all the payment advice data comes after all the part 1 data is finished

for this i have created two separate segments

part1 data is caputred in level1

and payment advice in level 2

so to enable this same I am trying to use delay output in DME segment but dont know how to use it exactly

Pls guide me how can we achieve the same

for your reference I am attaching you the format shared by bank along with sample data shared by the bank

we are on SAP R/3 4.7

entry.title: How to Generate a Dynamic URL for Approval Task in SAP Business Process Automation (SAP BPA)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm working on a workflow using SAP Build Process Automation and need help with generating a dynamic task approval link that can be sent via email notification to the approver.

Objective:

  • Generate a dynamic URL for each task instance.

  • Send the URL via email template or script task.

  • Clicking the link should open the approval task directly in My Inbox or SAP Build Work Zone / Launchpad.

Thanks in advance,
Parshuram

entry.title: User does not have sufficient privileges in Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi

I have created a process automation like a bellow example 
https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-academy-salesorder.html

here it is working fine, and workflow is triggering while creating the instance from Process and Workflow>> Start New instance and Close. 

But when i created the Build App for the API like bellow:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-workflow-trigger.html

But here it is giving error at the time for workflow instance 

"responseText": "{\"error\":{\"code\":\"bpm.workflowruntime.rest.user.not.sufficient.privileges\",\"message\":\"User does not have sufficient privileges.\"}}"

I have assign the role also, But still giving error. Can any one help me please....

entry.title: SAP Build Action: Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
entry.content:
I'm trying to test an Action in SAP Build. However, when trying to select a Destination, I get the the following error:
 
Error fetching BTP subaccount destinations for subscriber tenant context.
This error could happen for the following reasons:
Correlation ID: xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
 
This is happening for all Actions.

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Why is SAP Desktop Agent required for all automations?
entry.content:
I'm looking at putting together a SAP Build Process Automation project using only cloud services, so no local file storage or Excel / Outlook SDK.  In other words I'm looking to remove the SAP Desktop Agent dependancy.

However, on running the main process, the automaton is never called because it appears SAP Desktop Agent is a prerequisite for any automation, regardless of the dependencies (I'm using the CORE SDK only).

Can anyone confirm the above? Or is there a way of setting up an SAP Build Process Automation without the need for SAP Desktop Agent?

entry.title: Anyone Successfully Using SAP Desktop Agent on Mac?
entry.content: Can anyone confirm if the SAP Desktop Agent is available for Mac and whether it works properly? I remember there were some issues with installing it on Mac earlier. If anyone is currently using it on a Mac, could you please share your experience—specifically, whether it's functioning smoothly or not?

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation: Can an automation be ran without the SAP Desktop Agent?
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working an SAP Build Process Automation pilot project and have reached a point where the team is ready to start looking at deployment options in terms of how the automation will be ran. It seems like the desktop agent is necessary to run a scheduled unattended trigger. Ultimately, we want to avoid having to setup a virtual machine to carry out this particular automation. The below image contains our automation process and the options we see available. What would be the best way to run this particular scenario without the Desktop Agent? The automation currently uses the Outlook SDK, but research has led us to find that if we use Microsoft 365 SDK instead, we can run this scenario without the agent. Are these findings valid? If not, I would appreciate feedback on the best approach to help us move forward!

 

 

Regards,

Patrick Pienkowski

entry.title: Tutorials no longer open
entry.content: No matter which browser, the individual tutorials no longer open.

entry.title: Instalación de Desktop Agent en SBPA.
entry.content:
Estimados.

Buenas tardes.

Junto con saludar, quería solicitar ayuda, ya que actualmente tenemos una instalación del desktop agent de Sap Build Process Automation, para lo cual lo utilizamos para la función de las automatizaciones del Workflow implementado, para la instalación del ejecutable y servicio me guie por la siguiente documentación:

https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/install-desktop-agent-3-8c42e11b33824acc8273713f276589ea
https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/desktop-agent-service

En su momento se instaló el agente en el servidor a través de un usuario en específico, por lo cual, cuando el servidor realizaba las actualizaciones el agente se desconectaba debido a que solicitaba al usuario del servidor el ingreso de sesión, por dicho motivo, se realizó el cambio y se instaló en la máquina con el usuario de administrador, sin embargo, en la actualidad, cuando se realizan las actualizaciones automáticas del servidor también el agente se desconecta, dicho agente, ya se encuentra instalado también como servicio y dicho servicio cuando se visualiza el estado se encuentra en "running" , sin embargo, el agente aun así se desconecta. Esto me ocurre para el servidor de QA que tiene las actualizaciones de manera automática, no así, para el agente que se encuentra instalado en el servidor de PRD, ya que este servidor se encuentra con las actualizaciones programadas y el agente no se desconecta.

La versión que se está utilizando es la 3.32.58 y el modo se encuentra como "no asistido", si bien se entiende que existe una última actualización de dicho agente, no es compatible con la versión 1.48.34 del SDK ya deployado del proyecto. 

Quisiera saber si alguien ha instalado dicho agente en el servidor y como se puede estabilizar el estado de este.

Muchas gracias.
